ul.li: Comparison Count: Exactly $N \times M$ predicate evaluations in a naive scan.
Best Case: $Pages(Outer) + Pages(Inner)$ (If inner fits in page cache).
OP_Rewind: Resets the B-Tree cursor to the first entry.
OP_Column: Extracts data from the current row into a register.
OP_Next: Advances the cursor. If EOF is reached, falls through; else jumps to loop start.
OP_ResultRow: Invokes the sqlite3_callback function for the current row.

div.p: 4. Logic Optimization If customers.id is indexed (PRIMARY KEY), the OP_Rewind + Inner Loop is optimized by the Query Planner into OP_SeekRowid, changing complexity from $O(N \times M)$ to $O(N \log M)$.

text.tspan: Cost: O(log M) per outer row
